Mummies in the morning / by Mary Pope Osborne; illustrated by Sal Murdocca. p. cm. — (The magic tree house series; #3) “A First Stepping Stone book.” SUMMARY: Jack and his younger sister take a trip in their tree house back to ancient Egypt, where they help a queen’s mummy continue her voyage to the Next Life. eISBN: 978-0-375-89420-6 [1.
